description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: security_release:start and security_release:prepare, and a rule that runs only when the pipeline source is pipeline, web or api and the variable SECURITY_RELEASE_PIPELINE is set to prepare or true. Add a manual start job (security_release_prepare:start) in the start stage that runs `bundle exec rake 'security:prepare:start'`. In the prepare stage add jobs: security_release_prepare:appsec_issue (needs start and comms_issue, runs `bundle exec rake 'security:prepare:appsec_issue'`), security_release_prepare:check_component_branch_pipeline_status (needs start, runs `bundle exec rake 'security:check_component_branch_pipeline_status'`), security_release_prepare:comms_issue (needs start, runs `bundle exec rake 'security:prepare:comms_issue'`), security_release_prepare:mirror_status (needs start, runs `bundle exec rake 'mirror:status'`), security_release_prepare:notify_dedicated (needs start, runs `bundle exec rake 'security:prepare:notify_stage_team'` with variable STAGE_TEAM=dedicated), security_release_prepare:notify_developer_experience (runs the same rake with STAGE_TEAM=developer_experience), security_release_prepare:notify_development_analytics (runs the same rake with STAGE_TEAM=development_analytics), security_release_prepare:notify_jihu (runs `bundle exec rake 'security:prepare:notify_jihu'`), security_release_prepare:notify_releases (runs notify_stage_team with STAGE_TEAM=releases), security_release_prepare:notify_runner (runs notify_stage_team with STAGE_TEAM=runner), and security_release_prepare:review_security_fixes (runs `bundle exec rake 'security:prepare:review_security_fixes'`). All jobs inherit common setup and CI token configuration, share the same rule condition, and have no artifacts, caches, or deployment targets.
